hooks.command: [ "$(git -C "$(pwd)" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"block": true, "message": "Direct edits to main branch are not allowed. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feat/your-feature"}' >&2; exit 2; }

file="$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty')"; if [ -n "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *.rs) cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --check -- "$file" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; fi

file="$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty')"; if [ -n "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *.rs) echo "[hook] Rust file modified: $file — run 'cargo clippy' to verify" ;; *.ts|*.tsx) echo "[hook] TypeScript file modified: $file — run 'npm run type-check' to verify" ;; esac; fi

cmd="$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty')"; case "$cmd" in *'cargo build'*|*'cargo tauri build'*) echo '[hook] Build complete — check for warnings above' ;; *'cargo test'*) echo '[hook] Tests complete' ;; esac
echo '[shadow] Session ended. Remember: cargo clippy + npm run type-check before committing.'
